case_title: JOHN KOMTRABECKI VS. MID-CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL [AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS - DOREN E. HOHL] FILED BY PLAINTIFF KOMTRABECKI, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT MID-CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF JOHN KOMTRABECKI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MID-CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM REPRESENTED BY KULVINDER SANGHA, CLAIMS ADJUSTER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
